description: Legal fragment. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Involves [...] b. Yeshuʿa ha-Kohen. Probably a deed of sale, since most of the remaining text is describing the boundaries of a property in Qaṣr al-Shamʿ.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
